text.title: Schema Field Order Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every schema-field-order spec MUST enforce.

rule.statement: Field order MUST be: reasoning → intermediate → answer. Answer field MUST be the last required field.
rule.rationale: JSON is decoded left-to-right; the model commits as it emits. Reasoning first = think before answering.

rule.statement: Reasoning field MUST have a semantic name (analysis, rationale, scratchpad) NOT 'cot' or 'thinking'.
rule.rationale: Semantic names guide the model's behaviour.

rule.statement: Schema MUST NOT include shortcut fields (yes/no flags) before the reasoning field.
rule.rationale: Shortcuts let the model bypass reasoning.

rule.statement: All reasoning + answer fields MUST be 'required'.
rule.rationale: Optional reasoning lets the model omit it under load.

rule.statement: The spec MUST document expected token increase (reasoning fields = +30-100% output tokens).
